zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie Alyse de Crossland於1503年8月20日出生在英國越可爾可洛素藍德 希爾時，她的父親John Crossland19歲，母親Lady Agnes Baker20歲。她於1525年8月20日與William Calvert在英國越可爾拉斯可爾福結婚。他們至少是13個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年1月31日在英國越可爾拉斯可爾福享年54歲，埋葬在英國越可爾朋特福拉可特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjorie Alyse de Crossland于1503年8月20日出生在英国越可爾可洛素藍德 希爾时，她的父亲John Crossland19岁，母亲Lady Agnes Baker20岁。她于1525年8月20日与William Calvert在英国越可爾拉斯可爾福结婚。他们至少是13个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1558年1月31日在英国越可爾拉斯可爾福享年54岁，埋葬在英国越可爾朋特福拉可特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Crossland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in the parish of Almondbury, Yorkshire, named Crosland, from Old English cros ‘cross’ + land ‘newly cultivated land’.

variants.name: Croslin
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Crossland  .

variants.name: Crosslin
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Crossland  .

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

nameMeanings.name: Alyse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie Alyse de Crossland was born on 20 August 1503, in Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, England, her father, John Crossland, was 19 and her mother, Lady Agnes Baker, was 20. She married William Calvert on 20 August 1525, in Raskelfe, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 13 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 31 January 1558, in Raskelf, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie Alyse de Crossland est née le 20 août 1503, à Crossland Hill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Crossland, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Baker, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Calvert le 20 août 1525, à Raskelfe, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 13 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 janvier 1558, à Raskelf, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Pontefract, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjorie Alyse de Crossland am 20. August 1503 in Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Crossland 19 und ihre Mutter Lady Agnes Baker 20. Sie hat am 20. August 1525 in Raskelfe, Yorkshire, England William Calvert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 13 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Januar 1558 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Raskelf, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Alyse de Crossland è nata il il 20 agosto 1503 nel Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John Crossland, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Lady Agnes Baker, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William Calvert il 20 agosto 1525, nel Raskelfe, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 13 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 31 gennaio 1558, nel Raskelf, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Pontefract, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjorie Alyse de Crosslandが1503年8月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアクロスランド ヒルで生まれた時，父John Crosslandは19歳，母Lady Agnes Bakerは20歳であった。1525年8月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアラスケルフでWilliam Calvertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも13人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1558年1月31日にイギリスヨークシュアイアラスケルフで54歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアポンテフラクトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Alyse de Crossland(이)가 1503년 8월 20일 영국 요르크실르 크로슬랜드 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Crossland(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes Baker(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1525년 8월 20일 영국 요르크실르 래스켈프에서 William Calvert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 1월 31일 영국 요르크실르 래스켈프에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 폰테프라크트에 묻혔다.

pt.20 August 1503–31 January 1558: 20 de agosto de 1503–31 de janeiro de 1558
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Alyse de Crossland nasceu em 20 de agosto de 1503, em Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Crossland, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Baker, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William Calvert em 20 de agosto de 1525, em Raskelfe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 13 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de janeiro de 1558, em Raskelf, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie Alyse de Crossland родилась 20 августа 1503 г. в местности кроссланд хилл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Crossland было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Baker, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Calvert 20 августа 1525 г. в местности раскелф, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 31 января 1558 г. в местности раскелф, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности понтефракт, еркшир, Англия.

es.20 August 1503–31 January 1558: 20 de agosto de 1503–31 de enero de 1558
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjorie Alyse de Crossland nació el 20 de agosto de 1503, en Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Crossland, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Baker, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William Calvert el 20 de agosto de 1525, en Raskelfe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 13 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 31 de enero de 1558, en Raskelf, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
